nasb.text: Justice, and only justice, you shall pursue, that you may live and possess the land which the Lord your God is giving you.

esv.text: Justice, and only justice, you shall follow, that you may live and inherit the land that the Lord your God is giving you.

cnv.text: 你要追求公正公義，好使你能存活，並且能承受耶和華你的　神賜給你的地作產業。

ccb.text: 你们要追求公正公义，以便可以存活，承受你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们的土地。
